title: ODBC
text: ODBC The ODBC DBMS connector enables you to integrate ODBC databases with Uniface. Connector Feature Description Mnemonic OD0, OD1, OD2 Supported version For the supported platforms and product versions, see the Platform Availability Matrix . Supported utilities None SQL support Supported. Stored procedures support Not supported. Network: You can use the network capabilities of the Uniface Application Server or of the DBMS, if supported. Refer to your DBMS documentation for network capabilities. Related Links DBMS Connector Overview This section provides an overview of supported functionality and limitations for all DBMS connectors.
